subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! Thou hast directed thyself toward the Most Exalted Horizon, traversed both land and sea, and through the bounties of God - glorified be His majesty - attained unto a station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله الحمد قصد افق اعلی نمودی و از بر و بحر گذشتی و بعنایات حق جل جلاله بمقامی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @mystical themes, @personal instructions, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
